name: 40 MG Enzalutamide Capsules
about: 40 MG Enzalutamide Capsules are a type of general medicine that is used to treat prostate cancer. It works by blocking the effects of testosterone to slow down the growth of cancer cells. This medication is taken orally as per the doctors suggestion, with a dosage of 40mg. The capsules come in a physical form and are packed in 4x28 capsule boxes. It is advised to store these capsules in a cool place to maintain their effectiveness. These capsules are manufactured in India and are exported, supplied, and traded by our business.
